ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle (e.g., battery electric vehicle) */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_category" TEXT /* Category of the vehicle (e.g., passenger car, truck, bus) */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vehicle_category FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_category") REFERENCES vehicle_categories ("vehicle_category_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_make FOREIGN KEY ("make") REFERENCES vehicle_makes ("vehicle_make_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_model FOREIGN KEY ("model") REFERENCES vehicle_models ("vehicle_model_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_economy" (
  "fuel_economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel economy record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the fuel economy data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the fuel economy data was recorded */,
  "fuel_economy_value" REAL /* Fuel economy value (in miles/BTU) */,
  "city_mpg" REAL /* City MPG */,
  "highway_mpg" REAL /* Highway MPG */,
  "combined_mpg" REAL /* Combined MPG */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_economy_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emissions" (
  "emissions_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emissions record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the emissions data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the emissions data was recorded */,
  "emissions_value" REAL /* Emissions value (in grams/mile) */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions (in grams/mile) */,
  "n2o_emissions" REAL /* N2O emissions (in grams/mile) */,
  "ch4_emissions" REAL /* CH4 emissions (in grams/mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emissions_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emissions_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year (e.g., 2020) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., fuel economy, emissions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "report_detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report detail */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the detail belongs to */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "fuel_economy_value" REAL /* Fuel economy value (in miles/BTU) */,
  "emissions_value" REAL /* Emissions value (in grams/mile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "data_export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the data export */,
  "data_export_name" TEXT /* Name of the data export */,
  "data_export_date" TEXT /* Date the data export was generated */,
  "data_export_format" TEXT /* Format of the data export (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_categories" (
  "vehicle_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle category */,
  "vehicle_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle category (e.g., passenger car, truck, bus) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_makes" (
  "vehicle_make_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle make */,
  "vehicle_make_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle make (e.g., Tesla, Chevrolet) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_make_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_models" (
  "vehicle_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle model */,
  "vehicle_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle model (e.g., Model S, Silverado) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_model_id")
)
